summary: Phase 6 review — backend 20/20 PASS (analytics, gift cards CRUD, validate, checkout-status flip). Frontend mostly passes: WhatsApp FAB premium pill, Bespoke CTA, Navbar Custom link, granular cookie banner (3 buttons + 4-cat modal), CustomRequest budgets/qty=1, Gift Cards page with all 5 denominations + custom + submit, Admin Analytics default tab with 8 KPIs + 4 range buttons, Admin Gift Cards tab with filter pills. Two real bugs found: (1) Cookie 'Save preferences' does NOT persist consent to localStorage v2 key (only Accept All / Reject All work). (2) Footer link navigation timed out (footer-gift) — possibly broken router-link wiring or testid on non-anchor.

ui_bugs.issue: Clicking [data-testid=cookie-save] after toggling a category does NOT write to localStorage key 'tuncel_cookie_consent_v2'. 'Accept All' writes correctly (verified value: {essential:true,analytics:true,marketing:true,preferences:true,ts:...}). Likely cause: clicking toggle button inside parent <label> double-fires (label re-toggles state) and/or savePrefs() click is being absorbed by the surrounding label element. Modal closes visually but persistence never happens.

Clicking [data-testid='footer-gift'] does not navigate to /gift-cards within 8s. URL pattern wait timed out from /. Other home-custom-cta navigation works fine and scrolls to top. Likely footer-gift is not wired as a React Router <Link to='/gift-cards'> or the link click is intercepted.

integration_issues.issue: When trying to test ScrollToTop via footer link (FAQ/gift-cards), the navigation either didn't fire OR scrollY remained near the previous scroll (1771 from 1785). However the same ScrollToTop works perfectly for the Bespoke CTA flow (Home → /custom-request gave scrollY=0). Root cause appears tied to the footer link bug above — page is not actually navigating, so ScrollToTop never runs.

action_items: Fix CookieBanner savePrefs persistence — likely change the wrapping <label> to a <div> OR add event.stopPropagation() in the toggle button's onClick OR move savePrefs out of any element that swallows clicks. Verify localStorage.getItem('tuncel_cookie_consent_v2') is set after clicking Save preferences.

Fix Footer 'footer-gift' (and possibly all footer links) — ensure it is a real React Router <Link to='/gift-cards' data-testid='footer-gift'> so SPA navigation fires and ScrollToTop runs. Same probably affects footer-faq, footer-track-order, footer-return-request.
After fix, re-run /app/backend/tests/test_phase6.py and re-validate the cookie-modal + footer link Playwright flows.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now ~1869 lines — strongly recommend splitting into routers/: products.py, checkout.py, admin.py, chat.py, gift_cards.py, analytics.py. Maintainability is degrading.
GiftCardPurchaseIn.amount accepts float; spec says 'no MOQ from €35' for custom apparel but gift_card_checkout allows €0.01 (only rejects <=0). Consider min 5 or 10.
Gift card code uses random.choices — not cryptographically secure. For value-bearing codes use secrets.choice.
admin_analytics builds top_products with N+1 DB queries (one find_one per top_id). Acceptable for top_5 but worth a single $in query.
Cookie consent storage key is correct ('tuncel_cookie_consent_v2'), but DEFAULT_PREFS in saved state include extra 'ts' key — UI tests must allow extra keys when asserting.
seed_data_creation: Seeded gift_cards (TEST-* codes, GC-UPDTEST, GC-SEEDACT) in DB during pytest; teardown_module cleans them up after the run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend Phase 6 fully green via /app/backend/tests/test_phase6.py. Two frontend bugs remain: (a) CookieBanner 'Save preferences' does not write to localStorage tuncel_cookie_consent_v2 (Accept All works). (b) Footer-gift link does not SPA-navigate — likely all footer links are <a href> reloading the page instead of <Link>. Admin Analytics tab is correctly DEFAULT, has all 8 KPIs and 4 range buttons. Gift Cards admin tab has filter pills (ALL/Active/Pending/Partially used/Redeemed/Expired). Stripe gift card creation real-hits Stripe — limit reruns. checkout/status flip from pending_payment→active is verified via DB seed.
rca of the issue: Cookie 'Save preferences' bug: the entire category row is a <label> with the toggle <button> nested inside. Clicking the button propagates a click to the label which acts like a second click on the contained button (or React batches state in a way that prevents the latest prefs from being captured). When Save fires immediately after, the rendered prefs in scope are not what the user actually selected. Mitigation: replace outer <label> with <div> OR add e.stopPropagation() on the button.onClick, OR convert toggle to a real input[type=checkbox] with htmlFor.
